title: 30-DAY DRUG-FREE SHELTER - 211info
text: KLAMATH FALLS GOSPEL MISSION 30-DAY DRUG-FREE SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates an emergency/short term shelter that provides daily meals, showers, and clothing. Clients must be able to care for themselves and willing to do a 4 hour chore. 1931 Mission Avenue Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Age 18 and older. Prospective guests must be 72 hours free of substance use before intake. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-3:30pm Email (541) 882-4895 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 882-4895 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: State ID card AREA SERVED: Klamath and Lake Counties SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Services: Community Shelters * Homeless Men Community Shelters * Homeless Women Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - COMMUNITY MEALS HOUSING/SHELTER - BERRY HOUSE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH FALLS GOSPEL MISSION
